text:
hi,

On Tue, Nov 02, 1999 at 11:20:41AM +0200, Priit JĂ¤rv wrote:
 
> >Number:         14658
> >Category:       conf
> >Synopsis:       Estonian keymaps not yet included in FreeBSD distribution
 
> 	There are no estonian keymaps included yet with the FreeBSD
> distribution. However, there are already many estonian FreeBSD users,
> who might be interested in such a feature.

Only keymaps ? And what about fonts/locale/timedef/colldef ?

> begin 644 est-keymaps.tar
> M<VAA<F4O<WES8V]N<R]K97EM87!S+V5S=&]N:6%N+F-P.#4P+FMB9```````
> M````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````

Just a note -- what about gzipping you tarballs before sending it ?
